CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c)) , 'Invoice', IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment__c)) , 'Payment', IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c)) , 'Payable', IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c)) , 'Credit Memo' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c)) , 'Payout' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__c )) , 'LoC DrawDown' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c)) , 'Payment On Account' , '' )))))))
CustomField.label: _Z_Unused_2310 Source
